blocker_1.name: DAEMON_INTERVAL_TOO_COARSE
blocker_1.description: 15-min interval achieves closest gap of 2.15h, just outside the ±2h threshold. A 5-min interval would reliably catch games within 2h.

blocker_2.name: TSL_DEDUP_FILTER_BLOCKS_CLOSING_SNAPSHOTS
blocker_2.description: data/tsl_snapshot.py append_tsl_history() skips rows when MNL odds are unchanged (dedup by MNL odds key). When odds are stable in the ±2h closing window, NO snapshot is written — even though the closing=True trigger fired.
blocker_2.evidence: 3469710.1 had trigger at 15:10 UTC (gap=1.92h=inside 2h) but NO snapshot saved (odds unchanged from 14:55 UTC)
blocker_2.fix: Force-write snapshots when determine_capture_windows() returns closing=True, bypassing dedup OR storing a closing-flag timestamp separately

near_miss_analysis.description: 69 games had closest snapshots within 3h of game_time — would become COMPLETE_PAIR if dedup was bypassed for closing captures
near_miss_analysis.immediate_fix_potential: If dedup bypassed: ~69 additional COMPLETE_PAIR (220 + 69 = 289, still below 300)

proposed_fixes.name: FORCE_SAVE_CLOSING_SNAPSHOT
proposed_fixes.description: When determine_capture_windows() returns closing=True, bypass MNL dedup and force-write a closing snapshot to tsl_odds_history.jsonl with a 'closing_forced=true' flag
proposed_fixes.expected_lift: ~69 additional COMPLETE_PAIR immediately (historical backfill impossible, but future games fixed)
proposed_fixes.note: Code change — implementation in next task

proposed_fixes.name: REDUCE_DAEMON_INTERVAL
proposed_fixes.description: Reduce daemon interval from 15min to 5min to ensure at least one snapshot is captured within ±2h of each game_time
proposed_fixes.expected_lift: Combined with fix 1: near-certain coverage for all future games
proposed_fixes.authorization_sentence: YES: 授權將 daemon interval 從 15min 改為 5min
